description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

This tour's recruitment has been closed due to organizer circumstances.

The tour was designed to head toward the summit of Mt. Bonomine, learn the basics of stream hiking on the beautiful Shiratani Gorge route with gorge terrain, and enjoy experiencing streams. Lunch and dinner feature bento boxes and dinners prepared by a game meat restaurant, where participants also learn about game meat cuisine.

【Fee】23,000 yen per person (includes guide fee, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Takeshi Shinohara, Japan Mountain Guides Association member, mountaineering guide Stage III

【What to bring】20-liter backpack (with full waterproofing measures), complete stream hiking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountaineering equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED: Stream hiking on Mt. Bonomine's gorge, exploring Naguri River Shiratani Gorge source, and enjoying game meat dinner
